intentSynonyms: add a task to section in asana
add task to section in asana
move a task into a section in asana
description: Add a task to a specific section. The task will appear at the top of the section. A task can only be in one section of a given project at a time.

section_gid.description: Section GID to add the task to

task_gid.description: Task GID to add to the section
